Entries.Name: Security Updates Only Mode
Entries.Detail: Bundles the Windows Update controls that keep automatic downloads, driver offers, restart behavior, and update deferral in a security-focused posture.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows Update uses its normal automatic behavior
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Bundles Windows Update controls into a security-first posture by turning off automatic downloads, driver offers, restart prompts, and applying deferrals.

Entries.Name: Pause Windows Updates
Entries.Description: Pause Windows updates starting on a selected date
Entries.Detail: Writes the documented pause keys in HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings using the selected yyyy-MM-dd start date.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Pausing updates can delay important security fixes, so it should be used deliberately.
